DO.name: DateOutput
DO.description:
A string representing a specific point in time in the [ISO Format](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) `"yyyy-MM-dd[T]HH:mm:ss[±]hh:mm"` containing the information in which timezone this date is happening.

  For example `"2022-03-15T20:15:00+01:00"` would denote the _15th of March 2022, 20:15:00 local time in a timezone offset by 1 hour from UTC_. (e.g. Vienna)
